description_long: This is a pair of combination pliers featuring a robust metallic head and dual orange handles. The jaws are flat with a serrated gripping surface and include a central circular notch for gripping round objects or wires. The handles are coated in orange rubber or plastic, providing insulation and a comfortable, non-slip grip. The pivot joint is a classic fixed type, allowing the jaws to open and close smoothly. The metal surfaces show a matte, slightly rough finish, while the handles are smoother and grippy. No visible branding or logo is present on the tool.
description: A pair of combination pliers with orange insulated handles and a metallic, serrated jaw for gripping and cutting.
description_view_0: A clear side view showing the full length, orange handles, and the serrated jaws with a central notch.
description_view_1: A narrow, edge-on view highlighting the slim profile and the alignment of the handles and jaws.
description_view_2: An angled view displaying the depth of the jaws and the curvature of the handles.
description_view_3: A top-down view emphasizing the width of the jaws and the thickness of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, insulated handles with orange rubber or plastic coating for ergonomic grip.
attribute_jaw_design: Flat, serrated jaws with a central circular notch for gripping wires or round objects; includes a wire-cutting edge.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint allowing standard opening and closing motion; not adjustable.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth, rubberized coating on handles for enhanced grip; no visible ribbing or knurling.
